blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for 'Fill mode set to FCFS claim' is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided confirms that the fill mode for the staffing demand is set to 'fcfs_claim', which directly satisfies the requirement. Specifically, the demand object in the evidence shows 'fillMode': 'fcfs_claim', indicating that the system is configured for first-come, first-serve claims. This aligns perfectly with the requirement stated in the exploratory step.
